summary: The user sought tips for reducing screen time and improving sleep habits for better health and wellness. They decided to implement a tech-free hour before bedtime and expressed interest in finding enjoyable exercise routines, particularly rock climbing, while also seeking book recommendations for bedtime reading.
facts: The user plans to set a tech-free hour before bedtime to improve sleep quality. The user has been using their phone in bed frequently, which they believe affects their sleep. The user expressed interest in reading "The Alchemist" by Paulo Coelho as a bedtime book. The user is looking for tips to stay motivated to exercise regularly, as they tend to lose interest after a few weeks. The user is open to trying different types of exercise to find something enjoyable rather than feeling forced to go to the gym. The user has always wanted to try rock climbing but finds it intimidating. The user is interested in learning proper techniques and starting with bouldering as a beginner in rock climbing.
